summary: Data Visibility Features Testing Complete - All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Verified all features reported as lacking frontend data visibility are now working correctly: Timeline, Correlation, ML Prediction, Network Hosts, Zero Trust, Auto Response, VPN, and Browser Isolation. All pages display data from the database and API endpoints return proper data structures.

issues: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts may not render properly on initial load (known issue from previous iteration)
React hydration warning about span inside select element - minor React issue, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/timelines/recent - Returns 10+ threat timelines with threat_id, threat_name, severity
GET /api/correlation/history - Returns correlations with attribution data (FIN7, APT28, Lazarus Group)
GET /api/ml/predictions - Returns predictions with categories (ransomware, apt, insider_threat, malware, data_exfiltration)
GET /api/network/hosts - Returns 6 discovered hosts with IP, hostname, status, risk_level
GET /api/zero-trust/devices - Returns 4 registered devices with trust scores
POST /api/zero-trust/devices - Device registration creates device in both memory and database
GET /api/threat-response/settings - Returns proper auto_response structure with auto_block_enabled
POST /api/threat-response/settings/auto-block - Toggle endpoint works and persists state
GET /api/vpn/status - Returns server public key (INNXQAWHKGWsuiOIYgt8uIhO3jgvjnFskpGCptgMVCk=) and config
GET /api/browser-isolation/modes - Returns 4 isolation modes (full, cdr, read_only, pixel_push)
Authentication - Login with testuser@test.com works correctly

timeline_page.data_displayed: 20 threats with timelines, shows threat name, type, severity, date

correlation_page.data_displayed: 3 correlations with attribution (FIN7, APT28, Lazarus Group), MITRE tactics, confidence levels

ml_prediction_page.data_displayed: 8+ predictions showing entity, category, risk level, threat score

zero_trust_page.data_displayed: 4 registered devices with trust scores, compliance status, access policies

auto_response_page.data_displayed: Auto-Block toggle button (data-testid='auto-block-toggle'), Manual IP Block form, Response History

vpn_page.data_displayed: Server public key, VPN endpoint, How to connect instructions, Add Peer form

browser_isolation_page.data_displayed: How-to instructions, URL input, isolation mode dropdown, Sessions/Blocklist/Modes tabs

critical_code_review_comments: All data visibility issues have been resolved - pages now show data from database
VPN shows 'stopped' status which is expected (WireGuard interface not active in container) but displays server config info correctly
Browser Isolation has minor React hydration warning but functionality is not affected
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_data_visibility_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for data visibility features

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 pages load and display data correctly)

seed_data_creation: Agent seeded sample data for discovered_hosts, ml_predictions, zt_devices, threat_correlations collections in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All data visibility issues from user report have been fixed. Timeline shows 20 threats, Correlation shows 3 correlations with attribution, ML Prediction shows 8+ predictions, Network hosts shows 6 hosts, Zero Trust shows 4 devices, Auto Response has working toggle button, VPN shows server public key and instructions, Browser Isolation has how-to section. WireGuard server keys generated at /etc/wireguard/. VPN status shows 'stopped' which is expected in container environment.

mocked_integrations.note: VPN shows 'stopped' status because WireGuard interface is not active in container environment. This is expected behavior - the server is configured but not running.
